prep.summary: Review the reality that no work notes in your Google Drive match a previous meeting with Sai—leaving you without a direct historical summary. Focus your preparation instead on the pressing architectural tensions from your current files—specifically the disputed Agent Assist UI integration paths and the transition of decision-making to Integration Architects. Highlight the looming 15–20% capacity reduction from the cybersecurity uplift—alongside the new restricted enterprise pool for GitHub Copilot—as these resource constraints will heavily impact your upcoming delivery schedules.
tasks: Establish the baseline of your previous discussions with Sai to bridge the gap in the Google Drive folder history.
Debrief Sai on the highly contested Agent Assist UI options—specifically the tension between the custom homegrown interface and the AWS embedded widget.
Outline the projected 15–20% delivery capacity reduction resulting from the core cybersecurity uplift program.
Explain the new enterprise-wide pooling strategy and technical-role restrictions for GitHub Copilot usage.
prep.title: Monthly Arch Sync with Sai

6gktbm92usqd7n6l2og23pta6k.summary: Your work notes omit direct records of the recent Celonis demos and the last two discussions with Suresh—though a June 3rd briefing reveals Suresh’s team is pairing Celonis's back-end process mining with Skan.ai’s desktop capture. This dual-telemetry approach feeds the new Business Health Scorecard—a central dashboard designed to prioritize AI integrations. You need to sync with Sean Garner on these technical requirements before he initiates the express RFP with Brian Simpkin.
tasks: Secure the missing meeting records for the recent Celonis demos and Suresh’s briefings—these are currently absent from your 'Work Notes' folder.
Coordinate with Sean Garner to integrate the cross-functional requirements from both Bank and P&C business lines.
Verify the licensing structure and per-seat token economics with Brian Simpkin—the IT business process owner—prior to contract discussions.
Define the integration touchpoints between Celonis's data-level process mining and Skan.ai's user-flow screen captures.
6gktbm92usqd7n6l2og23pta6k.title: Skan.ai Follow up - Sean Garner
